name: hawk-security-ide
description: A security-native AI mission control for code, traffic, evidence, supply-chain health, and approved testing.

walkthroughs.title: Launch Hawk Security IDE
walkthroughs.description: Bring the private AI coding core, workspace graph and governed security runtime online.

steps.title: Connect the coding core
steps.description:
Install a verified local Ollama runtime or connect your own provider from OS-backed secret storage.
[Configure Hawk AI](command:hawk.configureLLMProvider)

steps.title: Map the workspace
steps.description:
Build Hawk's persistent AST, route and security-surface index.
[Index the workspace](command:hawk.indexWorkspace)

steps.title: Open Mission Control
steps.description:
Inspect source, traffic, findings, evidence and agent health in one operator view.
[Open Mission Control](command:hawk.openSecurityDashboard)

steps.title: Run an approved security workflow
steps.description:
Start with a passive workspace scan. Sensitive actions stay approval-gated.
[Run approved scan](command:hawk.runWorkspaceScan)

commands.title: Hawk: Run Approved Passive Workspace Scan
Hawk: Plan Governed Smart MCP Mission
Hawk: Show Next Edit Model Evaluation
Hawk: Roll Back from Verified Installer Cache
Hawk: Set Up Local AI with Ollama
Hawk: Configure AI Provider and API Key
Hawk: Remove Current AI Provider Key
Hawk: Run Automatic Debug / Test / Fix Loop

hawk.daemonPath.description: Absolute path to hawk-ide-daemon. Leave empty to use the executable on PATH.

hawk.hawkHealthUrl.description: GitHub raw or Contents API URL for a Hawk health.json report. Optional token is held only in Hawk's encrypted local secret storage.

hawk.preferredProvider.description: Preferred LLM provider. Use Hawk: Configure AI Provider and API Key so credentials stay in OS-backed secret storage.

hawk.preferredModel.description: Preferred model ID. API keys stay on this machine.

hawk.preferredBaseUrl.description: Optional local or provider-compatible base URL used by Hawk AI and Hawk Tab.

hawk.localAI.offerSetupOnFirstRun.description: Offer the verified Ollama and local coding model setup when Hawk has no configured provider.

hawk.openMissionControlOnStartup.description: Open the Hawk Mission Control editor whenever a Hawk window starts.

hawk.tab.enabled.description: Enable private Hawk inline code completion.

hawk.tab.debounceMs.description: Delay before Hawk requests an inline completion.

hawk.tab.maxPrefixChars.description: Maximum code-before-cursor context sent to the configured model.

hawk.tab.maxSuffixChars.description: Maximum code-after-cursor context sent to the configured model.

hawk.tab.editPrediction.enabled.description: Predict the next safe multiline edit from recent changes, diagnostics, and repository context.

hawk.tab.editPrediction.minConfidence.description: Discard model-proposed multiline edits below this confidence threshold.

hawk.tab.editPrediction.cacheEnabled.description: Reuse exact and partially typed Next Edit predictions in a bounded in-memory cache. Applies after the local control plane restarts.

hawk.tab.editPrediction.cacheTtlSeconds.description: Lifetime of an in-memory Next Edit cache entry. Applies after the local control plane restarts.

hawk.tab.editPrediction.cacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum in-memory Next Edit entries. Source text is never written to the persistent model scorecard.

hawk.tab.editPrediction.multiFile.maxFil.description: Maximum complete workspace documents included in an approval-gated coordinated Multi-File Next Edit.

hawk.index.embeddings.enabled.description: Add optional local Ollama embeddings to Hawk's persistent AST/type index. Source remains on this machine.

hawk.index.embeddings.model.description: Local Ollama embedding model used by Hawk hybrid search.

hawk.index.embeddings.baseUrl.description: Loopback-only Ollama URL for optional Hawk embeddings.

hawk.debug.autoFix.maxAttempts.description: Maximum approved diagnose/edit/test retries in one isolated Hawk Debug Agent loop. Apply always remains manual.

hawk.agent.autonomous.maxRepairAttempts.description: Maximum bounded repair attempts after an autonomous Hawk AI task fails detected project gates. The final patch always requires manual Apply.

hawk.agent.parallelDocker.image.description: Existing local Docker image used for direct parallel Hawk AI session execution.

hawk.agent.parallelDocker.strategy.description: Placement strategy used by Hawk's intelligent Docker scheduler for parallel AI lanes.

hawk.agent.parallelDocker.cpuPerLane.description: Docker CPU quota assigned to each parallel Hawk AI lane.

hawk.agent.parallelDocker.memoryMbPerLan.description: Docker memory limit in MB assigned to each parallel Hawk AI lane.

enumDescriptions: Allow the isolated worker to reach the configured AI provider. Loopback provider URLs are mapped to host.docker.internal.
Disable all container networking. Use only when the worker image contains an offline-compatible model endpoint.
hawk.agent.parallelDocker.networkMode.description: Network policy for parallel Hawk AI containers. Every launch remains approval-gated.

hawk.agent.terminalCapture.enabled.description: Automatically capture workspace terminal command output through VS Code shell integration for optional Hawk AI context. Capture is memory-only, bounded, and secret-redacted.

hawk.agent.terminalCapture.includeSucces.description: Include successful commands as well as failures in recent Hawk AI terminal context.

hawk.agent.terminalCapture.maxCommands.description: Maximum recent shell-integrated commands attached to one Hawk AI task.

hawk.agent.terminalCapture.maxContextCha.description: Maximum redacted terminal-context characters considered before the overall Hawk AI context bound.

hawk.agent.terminalCapture.retentionMinu.description: Memory-only lifetime of captured workspace terminal executions.

hawk.reproduction.image.description: Existing local Docker image for Hawk's offline, zero-network vulnerability-signal reproduction sandbox.

hawk.updates.checkOnStartup.description: Check the official Hawk production update service after startup.

hawk.updates.channel.description: Hawk release channel. Canary receives staged cohorts before broader beta/stable rollout.

hawk.updates.feedUrl.description: HTTPS Hawk update feed. A validated GitHub Releases API fallback remains active if this service is unavailable.

hawk.updates.expectedPublisher.description: Optional Windows certificate subject pin. Every Windows update always requires a valid, Windows-trusted Authenticode signature.

scripts.build: node scripts/create-extension-icon.mjs && node scripts/build-daemon.mjs && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:vscode --outfile=dist/extension.js
